name: Great Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours, or until chilled.
HINT: Out of time? Prepare ahead by cubing the vegetables and placing them, along with all other ingredients, into a blender or food processor. Blend slowly until the vegetables are chunky and the soup is well blended.
